_comment: GENERATED by sixfour-spec / Codegen.Golden — do not edit by hand. Regenerate with: cabal run spec-codegen.

meta.encoding_note: every float is the 16-hex-digit IEEE-754 double bit pattern; decode via bit pattern (int(s,16)+struct / Double(bitPattern:)), NOT decimal parsing.
meta.tolerance_note: weights+inputs transport bit-exact; OUTPUTS compared within tolerance — cross-language matmul summation order differs at the ULP level.
meta.weight_layout: row-major (out, in) — the PyTorch/MLX nn.Linear.weight layout; weights are RAW (pre-σ-mask), each port applies the mask in its forward.
